Phased approach: (1) immediately replace SKAT → I_GLACCOUNTTEXT (Level D blocker) for short-term compliance; (2) investigate released API alternatives for payroll posting data (the SUBMIT + CL_SALV_BS_RUNTIME_INFO interception of RPCIP_DOCUMENT_ANALYSE is architecturally incompatible with ABAP Cloud); (3) medium-term: re-architect entire program as a BTP CAP or ABAP Cloud extension. Level D due to SKAT direct access (→ I_GLACCOUNTTEXT), BAPI_GL_ACC_GETPERIODBALANCES (Level B), three Adobe Forms FMs (Level B), and HR_GET_EMPLOYEE_DATA (unclassified — validate and replace with I_PersonNameDetails or I_EmployeeBasicData if not released). Target BTP architecture: (a) payroll posting data via released Payroll OData APIs (I_PayrollDocumentItem or SuccessFactors EC Payroll integration); (b) GL balances via I_GLACCOUNT or I_GLAccountBalance CDS views; (c) employee master data via I_Employee/I_PersonWorkAgreement OData services; (d) PDF savings contributions form via SAP Forms Service by Adobe on BTP.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_FUFINVOICE_PRINTING_MAILFUF Periodic Customer Invoice Printing and Email Dispatch — A financial report that generates bilingual Arabic/English FUF periodic customer invoices as Adobe Forms PDFs with Hijri/Gregorian dual-calendar dates, and optionally emails them to customers via SAP BCS. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed Hybrid. I_OpenItemFIDocItem for open items; bilingual PDF via SAP Forms Service on BTP. Side-by-Side BTP extension (primary for Public Cloud). Level D due to BCS email classes (SO_NEW_DOCUMENT_ATT_SEND_API1, CL_BCS — Not To Be Released), Hijri calendar utility with no ABAP Cloud successor, and direct BSID table access. Architecture: (1) open customer line items via I_OpenItemFIDocItem or API_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT OData V4 replacing BSID; (2) bilingual Arabic/English FUF invoice PDF with dual Gregorian/Hijri calendar dates via SAP Forms Service by Adobe on BTP using ZFI_FUFINVOICE_PRINTINGMAIL_F template migrated to XDP format; (3) Hijri/Islamic calendar conversion via BTP microservice using mature NPM hijri-date libraries; (4) email dispatch via SAP BTP Mail Destination API or SAP Alert Notification Service replacing BCS email framework; (5) replace SCMS_XSTRING_TO_BINARY with CL_ABAP_CONV_CODEPAGE=>CONVERT; (6) replace CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPHA_OUTPUT with ABAP string operations. The SADAD FUF specifics, semi-annual Islamic billing cycle, and dual-calendar bilingual format have proximity score 3/10 — no standard output management covers this combination. On-Stack path viable for Private Cloud with constrained applicability.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_GLWF_TRACKINGG/L Workflow Approval Tracking Report — A Finance report that tracks and displays the multi-level approval status of SAP workflow instances triggered by General Ledger account master data creation and change events. —Not Available as SaaS — Full BTP Extension as a Workaround BTP Side-by-Side. Replace SWWWIHEAD + SWW_WIRET with I_WORKFLOWSTATUSOVERVIEW CDS views. On-Stack refactoring using released ABAP Cloud APIs and Fiori Elements. Evaluate the specific workflow table dependencies (SWWWIHEAD, SWW_WIRET, SWW_CONTOB) and replace with released CDS views: I_WORKFLOWSTATUSOVERVIEW, I_WORKFLOWSTATUSDETAILS, I_WORKFLOWEXTERNALSTATUS. Replace REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY with Fiori Elements List Report. The GL workflow tracking functionality (monitoring FI document approval status across the SAP workflow framework) maps partially to standard Fiori apps 'My Inbox' and workflow monitoring capabilities in S/4HANA Public Cloud — evaluate retirement potential before committing to custom migration. If retirement is not viable due to SIDF-specific GL workflow tracking requirements, rebuild as ABAP Cloud RAP application consuming released workflow CDS views.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_GRIR_CLEARINGGR/IR Clearing Account Contract Detail Report — A Finance report that enriches GR/IR clearing account line items with procurement contract context, helping finance teams identify which vendors, purchase orders, and contracts have pending goods receipts or outstanding invoice postings. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed On-Stack ABAP Cloud. Must migrate ZZPROJNAME custom field to Custom Fields & Logic framework first. On-Stack ABAP Cloud refactoring (primary) using released CDS views. Level B/C — the primary concerns are direct table access patterns (EKKO, EKPO, MSEG, RSEG, EKBE using custom field ZZPROJNAME in EKKO append) and REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY. Replace: (1) EKKO/EKPO → I_PURCHASEORDERAPI01, I_PURCHASEORDERITEMAPI01; (2) EKBE → I_PURCHASEORDERHISTORYAPI01; (3) MSEG → I_MATERIALDOCUMENTITEM_2; (4) RSEG → I_SUPLRINVCITEMPURORDREFAPI01; (5) vendor data → I_SUPPLIER; (6) purchasing group → I_PURCHASINGGROUP. Critical pre-work: migrate custom field ZZPROJNAME from EKKO append structure to S/4HANA Custom Fields and Logic framework (this is a hard blocker — must be resolved before CDS development). Replace REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY with Fiori Elements List Report. Evaluate C_GRIRClearingAccount CDS consumption view as a potential base entity to minimise custom joins. Use ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) with ABAP_CLOUD_READINESS check variant to validate compliance.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_IC_COCD_UPDIntercompany Incoming Payment Company Code Correction Utility — A one-time data correction program that identifies incoming payment staging records missing a company code and assigns them the target company code 'SIDF'. —Not Available as SaaS — Full BTP Extension as a Workaround On-Stack ABAP Cloud. One-time data correction. Refactor for ABAP Cloud compliance. On-Stack refactoring for ABAP Cloud compliance. Level B — operates exclusively on custom Z-table ZFI_I_INCOM_PAY (customer namespace), updating blank BUKRS fields to 'SIDF'. The program is a one-time data correction utility. Remediation: (1) the iterative LOOP/MODIFY/CLEAR pattern can be simplified to a single SET-based UPDATE ZFI_I_INCOM_PAY SET bukrs = 'SIDF' WHERE bukrs = SPACE — more efficient and ABAP Cloud compliant; (2) add COMMIT WORK with explicit sy-subrc check and error message on failure (current program has no error handling); (3) add application log (CL_BAL_LOG) to record execution details; (4) add dry-run/test mode parameter. After successful execution and verification that all blank BUKRS records are corrected, retire this utility. Standard S/4HANA incoming payment correction functionality and I_IncomingPayment CDS view should cover future correction scenarios.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_ICP_BATCH_CREATIONICP Bank Payment Batch Creation and Tracking — A Finance program that automates the creation of bank payment batches for Intercompany Payment (ICP) transactions received from the MIM-ICP middleware, and updates the resulting batch numbers back into the custom payment information table. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed Hybrid. ABAP Cloud RAP for backend; Fiori Elements UX; replace SAPFPAYM_MERGE SUBMIT with released APIs. Complete redesign using ABAP Cloud (RAP) for backend logic and Fiori Elements for UX, deployed on SAP BTP ABAP Environment or in-system embedded Steampunk. Level C with no SAP GUI runtime, no classic SLIS ALV, and no unrestricted ABAP SUBMIT of standard programs available on S/4HANA Public Cloud. Architecture: (1) replace PYORDH, BNK_BATCH_ITEM access with released Payment APIs; (2) replace SAPFPAYM_MERGE SUBMIT with released Payment Medium Workbench APIs; (3) replace REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY with Fiori Elements List Report; (4) ICP transaction state management via ZFI_ICP_PAYINFO/ZFI_ICP_VALIDATE exposed as RAP OData V4; (5) use SAP Integration Suite for MIM-ICP middleware integration — event-driven via Business Event Mesh (AccountingDocumentPosted) replacing manual report execution; (6) batch status updates via Payment business events eliminating manual reconciliation. Proximity score 3/10 — standard payment batch creation doesn't replicate the specific MIM-ICP handshake and batch tracking workflow. Z-table data migration strategy required for ZFI_ICP_VALIDATE, ZFI_ICP_PAYINFO, ZFI_ICP_PAY_RES.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_ICP_BULK_PAYMENT_RESPONSEBulk Payment Response Status Enquiry for Riyad Bank (BCM) — A background program that monitors outstanding bulk payment submissions to Riyad Bank and automatically triggers status enquiry requests for any payment batch that has not received a response within 30 minutes of submission. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed Hybrid. On-Stack ABAP Cloud refactor or BTP Side-by-Side. Core logic is technically simple. On-Stack ABAP Cloud refactoring or Side-by-Side BTP extension. Level C due to direct ZFI_ICP_PAY_RES table access (customer namespace — acceptable) and proxy class ZCO_SI_ICPBULK_PAY_ENQUIRY_OUT usage. The core logic (30-minute threshold check via SCOV_TIME_DIFF, set ENQUIRY_FLAG, COMMIT WORK) is technically simple. Replace: (1) SCOV_TIME_DIFF (Level B — no confirmed ABAP Cloud successor) with ABAP Cloud-native timestamp arithmetic using CL_ABAP_UTCLONG or CL_ABAP_TSTMP; (2) regenerate proxy class ZCO_SI_ICPBULK_PAY_ENQUIRY_OUT as an ABAP Cloud-compliant web service consumer using SM59 released APIs or SAP Integration Suite outbound iFlow; (3) replace LEAVE LIST-PROCESSING with proper ABAP Cloud exception handling. Consider migrating the bulk payment enquiry to an event-driven pattern using SAP Business Event Handling framework triggering the enquiry automatically when a batch ages past the 30-minute threshold, eliminating the need for manual batch report execution.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_ICP_INVOICE_CREATIONICP Vendor Invoice Creation from MIM-ICP/SIDF Staging Data — A Finance module program that reads approved vendor payment records from a custom staging table, presents them for review in an interactive ALV grid, and creates posted accounts payable invoice documents in SAP FI for company code ICP1. —Fully Available as part of the Standard Hybrid. Replace BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST (Level D) with I_JOURNALENTRYTP via EML. On-Stack ABAP Cloud refactoring or Side-by-Side BTP extension. Replace direct FI table accesses with released CDS views (BKPF → I_JOURNALENTRY, BSEG → I_JOURNALENTRYLINEITEM, LFA1 → I_SUPPLIER). Replace BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST (Level D — Not To Be Released) with I_JOURNALENTRYTP behavior definition via EML. Replace REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY with Fiori Elements List Report. Replace BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT (released — no change needed) with RAP's managed transaction handling. ICP invoice creation logic (matching intercompany payment orders to FI invoices) should be exposed as a RAP action on a custom ICP Invoice BO. Evaluate integration with standard S/4HANA Intercompany Reconciliation and SAP Multi-Bank Connectivity for the ICP payment leg. The Saudi-specific MIM-ICP middleware integration should be handled via SAP Integration Suite iFlow.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_ICP_PAYM_ORDER_CREATIONIntercompany Payment Order Bulk Creation (ICP/SIDF) — A program that automatically creates bulk SAP payment orders for validated intercompany payment transactions received from the MIM-ICP/SIDF external platform, and writes the resulting payment order details back to custom tracking tables. —Fully Available as part of the Standard Hybrid. RAP actions on custom ICP BO; replace BSEG/REGUV reads with I_OperationalAcctgDocItem. On-Stack ABAP Cloud RAP refactoring with Side-by-Side integration for MIM-ICP middleware. Level D due to direct BSEG access (Not To Be Released → I_OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM), REGUV (payment run parameters → PCE_I_PRAPAYMRUNDETAIL), PYORDP (payment order positions → I_APMPAYMENTORDER). Architecture: (1) implement createPaymentOrders and retryStatusUpdate as RAP actions on custom ICP Payment Order BO; (2) replace BSEG/REGUV/PYORDP reads with I_OperationalAcctgDocItem, PCE_I_PraPaymentRunDetail, I_ApmPaymentOrder CDS views; (3) integrate Application Jobs API for background payment run scheduling; (4) implement RAP authorization for ZICM_OBJ; (5) build Fiori Elements List Report with filter bar and custom action buttons; (6) build Integration Suite inbound iFlow (MIM-ICP → ZFI_ICP_VALIDATE) and outbound iFlow (ZFI_ICP_PAYINFO → MIM-ICP) with event or polling trigger. The IC000–IC999 payment run ID sequence logic must be preserved in RAP action business logic. Estimated effort: M (16 days).
Finance (Custom) ZFI_ICP_PAYMENT_STATUSVendor Payment Bank Status Transmission to Tanafusiya MIM — An FI-BCM report that retrieves vendor payment batch statuses from SAP's banking communication layer and transmits acceptance or rejection outcomes to the Tanafusiya middleware via an outbound web service proxy. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed Hybrid. Confirm SAP Banking Services batch scope in Public Cloud tenant before migration. On-Stack ABAP Cloud refactoring using released CDS views and Fiori Elements. Level C due to direct BNK_BATCH_HEADER and BNK_BATCH_ITEM reads (SAP Banking Services tables — no confirmed released CDS view successors) and REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY. Critical prerequisite: confirm whether SAP Banking Services batch processing (BNK_BATCH_HEADER, BNK_BATCH_ITEM) is in scope for the target Public Cloud tenant. If not available, redesign the bank batch status integration using SAP Multi-Bank Connectivity released APIs. Replace: (1) BNK_BATCH_HEADER/BNK_BATCH_ITEM → released payment batch status APIs (validate availability per tenant); (2) ZFI_ICP_VALIDATE/ZFI_ICP_PAYINFO/ZFI_ICP_PAY_RES → ABAP Cloud RAP entities (customer namespace); (3) REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY → Fiori Elements List Report with zebra row colors via criticality annotations; (4) custom auth object ZICM_STATU → re-register in target authorization framework. Data migration strategy required for all three Z-tables containing live ICP transaction history.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_ICP_STATUS_REPORTICP Payment Process End-to-End Status Report — A Finance module report that provides authorized AP and Finance staff with a unified, real-time view of every Intercompany/Credit Payment transaction as it progresses through its full lifecycle — from initial creation through bank acceptance or rejection. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed Hybrid. BTP Fiori ALP using RAP + CDS. Confirm Banking Services scope for Public Cloud. Side-by-Side BTP extension (Fiori List Report / Analytical List Page built on ABAP Cloud RAP + CDS). Level C driven by two violations: direct SELECT on BNK_BATCH_HEADER and BNK_BATCH_ITEM (unclassified SAP Banking Services tables) and REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY (Classic API). Before migration, confirm whether SAP Banking Services batch processing is in scope for the target public cloud tenant — if not, redesign using SAP Multi-Bank Connectivity or equivalent released banking APIs. Architecture: (1) CDS View layer exposing ZFI_ICP_VALIDATE, ZFI_ICP_PAYINFO, ZFI_ICP_PAY_RES as ABAP Cloud entities; (2) bank batch/item status via released Payment APIs replacing BNK_BATCH_* access; (3) RAP OData V4 service wrapping the CDS views; (4) Fiori List Report or Analytical List Page replacing REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY; (5) authorization check via RAP authorization framework replacing classic AUTHORITY-CHECK. Estimated effort: L (15–25 days). High business value — sole consolidated audit trail for SIDF's multi-step intercompany payment lifecycle.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_ICP_STMNT_AUTO_CLEARINGIntercompany Payment (ICP) Account Statement Auto Clearing — A Financial Accounting report that identifies and automatically clears open vendor documents created by the Intercompany Payment account statement posting process in Saudi Arabia. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed Hybrid. SAP Build Process Automation 'Mass Clearing of GL/Customer/Supplier Open Items' recommended. Side-by-Side BTP extension for full clean core compliance. Level D due to direct access to forbidden tables and Classic APIs. The use of SAP Build Process Automation template 'Mass Clearing of GL, Customer and Supplier Open Items' is the recommended starting point for implementing automated ICP clearing on S/4HANA Public Cloud. Architecture: (1) identify ICP open vendor documents via I_OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM or I_OPENITEMSFORVENDORS CDS views replacing direct BSEG/LFA1 access; (2) automatic clearing via SAP Build Process Automation template wrapping released FI Clearing APIs (I_JOURNALENTRYTP for posting, CE_FINANCIALDOCUMENTCLEARING for matching); (3) ICP reference matching logic (SIDF transaction ID, ICP transaction ID, vendor number) implemented as SAP Build rule or CAP custom logic; (4) ALV grid for review before posting → Fiori Elements List Report with 'Post' action button; (5) ZFI_ICP_VALIDATE custom table exposed as ABAP Cloud RAP entity. Standard S/4HANA provides clearing automation but not the custom ICP reference logic or Z-table integration.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_ICP_VENDOR_CREATION_BGAutomated Intercompany Partner Vendor Creation Background Job — A scheduled background job that reads intercompany partner vendor creation requests from a staging table, creates vendor master records and bank details in SAP, updates staging results, logs errors, and notifies a finance distribution list by email. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed Hybrid. ABAP Cloud background job + Business Partner API; BTP Integration Suite for email. Rebuild as ABAP Cloud background job using released Vendor Master APIs (Business Partner API). Side-by-side for email notification via BTP Integration Suite.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_ICP_VENDOR_REPROCESSICP Vendor Master Reprocessing with Bank Details and IBAN Maintenance — A Finance reprocessing report that retries failed Inter-Company Partner vendor master creations, updates bank account and IBAN details, logs errors, sends email notifications, and displays results in an ALV grid. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed Hybrid. SAP Build Process Automation for retry orchestration + released Vendor/BP APIs. Side-by-side BTP extension using SAP Build Process Automation for retry orchestration and released Vendor/Business Partner APIs. Retire custom reprocessing ABAP logic.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_ICP_VENDOR_REVIEWInter-Company Procurement Vendor Review and Approval — An interactive ALV-based Accounts Payable tool for reviewing and approving newly created Inter-Company Procurement vendors in SAP, with automated email notification to the AP team upon approval. —Not Available as SaaS — Full BTP Extension as a Workaround Hybrid. Rebuild as RAP Fiori Elements or BTP Fiori app using Business Partner APIs. Rebuild as RAP-based Fiori Elements app (on-stack) or side-by-side BTP Fiori app using Business Partner APIs. Standard Vendor Confirmation Fiori app may cover base scenario.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_INCOMING_PAYMENTSIncoming Customer Payments Processing and Parking — A custom SAP FI report that uploads incoming customer payment data from Excel, displays it in an editable ALV grid for review, and parks the corresponding accounting documents in SAP while maintaining a custom payment log. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed BTP Side-by-Side. Full redesign using released AR APIs. Replace Excel upload with bank statement integration. Full side-by-side BTP redesign using released AR APIs. Replace Excel upload with standard SAP file upload service or bank statement integration.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_INCOMING_PAYMENTS_MPIncoming Payments Multiple Posting for SIDF — A dialog-screen program enabling SIDF finance staff to record and post multiple customer incoming payments in a single session, automatically creating SAP FI accounting documents. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed Hybrid. BTP Side-by-Side for multi-entry UX; on-stack RAP for data validation logic. Side-by-side extension is required for multi-entry UX. On-stack RAP refactoring for data validation logic. Clean core rating B due to moderate modification scope.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_INDUSTRIAL_LOAN_BALANCEIndustrial Loan Balance Report for SIDF — A consolidated financial report that reconciles industrial loan balances by aggregating GL account balances, bank statement repayments, treasury cash flows, and loan payment categories for a selected fiscal period at SIDF. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed Hybrid. On-stack CDS views for data; BTP Fiori for presentation; SAP Forms for PDF. Full clean core rebuild required: on-stack CDS views for data aggregation, side-by-side BTP Fiori app for presentation, SAP Forms Service for PDF output.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_INDUSTRIAL_LOAN_BALANCE_CMIndustrial Loan Balance Monthly Comparison Report — A monthly report that reconciles industrial loan instalment payments from SAP Treasury against actual incoming payments recorded in the electronic bank statement system. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed Hybrid. BTP Fiori or on-stack RAP using released TRM and EBS standard APIs. Side-by-side BTP Fiori app or on-stack RAP refactoring using released TRM and EBS standard APIs.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_INTER_MEMO_BANK_LETTERInter-Bank Fund Transfer Document Generator (Internal Transfer Memo & Letter) — A program that generates official Adobe-based bank transfer documents authorizing internal fund movements between company bank accounts, with Arabic language output, Hijri calendar dates, and Eastern Arabic numerals for Saudi Arabian financial operations. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed Hybrid. On-stack for data extraction; BTP Side-by-Side for SAP Forms Service form generation. On-stack refactoring for data extraction with side-by-side BTP for form generation. SAP Forms Service replaces custom Adobe Form objects.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_INTRATE_CALC_GLCBDaily Interest Calculation on G/L Closing Bank Balances — A program that calculates daily interest on bank account closing balances for a selected period, displays results in an ALV grid with Gregorian and Hijri dates, and parks the resulting interest journal entry in SAP FI. —Fully Available as part of the Standard BTP Side-by-Side. Core data via released GL balance CDS views; complex interest calc on BTP. Side-by-side extension for complex interest calculation and parking workflow. Core data accessed via released GL balance CDS views.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_INTRATE_ITEMSInterest Rate Calculation on GL Closing Balances — A Finance report that displays interest rate calculation items stored against General Ledger closing balances, showing statement date, G/L account, debit/credit indicator, closing balance, applicable interest rate, and calculated interest amount. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed On-Stack ABAP Cloud. Refactor using ABAP Cloud CDS views over ZFI_INTRATE + standard tables. On-stack refactor using ABAP Cloud CDS views over ZFI_INTRATE custom table and GL standard tables. Overall clean core rating C.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_JV_PRINT_PROGFinance Journal Voucher Print Program — A program to retrieve posted and parked accounting documents and render them as structured PDF Journal Voucher forms with full line-item details, account descriptions, and long texts. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed Hybrid. BTP Side-by-Side with CAP/ABAP Cloud + released FI Document APIs + SAP Forms Service. Build as side-by-side extension using CAP or ABAP Cloud with released FI Document APIs. SAP Forms Service by Adobe replaces on-stack Adobe Form dependencies.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_KAFALA_DISTKafala Distribution Cost Posting to Accounts Receivable — A custom SAP report for SIDF that collects actual Controlling costs for Kafala cost centres and creates a parked accounts receivable document in Financial Accounting to record the Kafala distribution charge. —Fully Available as part of the Standard On-Stack ABAP Cloud. Released CO + AR APIs. Rating D due to custom table + direct CO access. On-stack ABAP Cloud migration using released CO and AR APIs. Clean core rating D due to custom table dependencies and direct CO data access patterns.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_LC_DETAILED_REPORTLetter of Credit Detailed Report — A detailed analytical report providing a consolidated view of the full lifecycle of Letters of Credit, covering financial status, disbursement tracking, past-due obligations, HR-linked consultant details, and processing performance metrics. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed Hybrid. On-stack CDS for LC data; BTP Fiori for multi-panel analytical view. On-stack CDS views for LC data aggregation; side-by-side Fiori app for the multi-panel analytical view. Standard LC apps in S/4HANA cover core scenarios.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_LC_DOC_REPORTLetter of Credit Document Status Report for Loan Disbursements — A finance report providing a consolidated view of all Letter of Credit documents linked to customer loans, showing lifecycle statuses, outstanding balances, bank charges, and due date change history. —Fully Available as part of the Standard BTP Side-by-Side. Released LC + Customer APIs. Evaluate standard S/4HANA LC apps first. Side-by-side BTP Fiori app using released LC and Customer APIs. Standard S/4HANA LC management apps may cover core requirements.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_LC_MANAGEMENT_REPORTLetter of Credit Management Report — A consolidated reporting tool for monitoring active letter-of-credit positions, showing original amounts, disbursements, remaining balances, and reductions per customer across company codes. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed BTP Side-by-Side. Evaluate standard S/4HANA LC Monitoring Fiori app before building custom. Side-by-side BTP Fiori app. Evaluate standard S/4HANA LC Monitoring Fiori app coverage before building custom report.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_LC_SD_REPORTLetter of Credit Details Report for Loan Co-ordination & Service Department — A consolidated ALV grid report providing a full portfolio view of active Letters of Credit, combining accounting documents, loan disbursement data, open receivables, and HR consultant profiles into a single operational overview. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed Hybrid. On-stack CDS for aggregation; BTP Fiori for dept view; People APIs for HR profiles. On-stack CDS views for data aggregation; side-by-side Fiori app for department-specific view. HR profile integration needs released People APIs.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_LC_STATUS_REPORTLetter of Credit Lifecycle Status Report — A report to monitor and summarise the lifecycle status of Letters of Credit issued against customer loan accounts, categorising each instrument as Open, Waiting, Fully Paid, or Expired. —Fully Available as part of the Standard On-Stack ABAP Cloud. Released LC CDS views. Evaluate S/4HANA LC Status Fiori app as near-equivalent. On-stack refactor using released LC CDS views and ABAP Cloud. Close standard coverage gap — S/4HANA LC status Fiori app may serve as near-equivalent.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_LOAN_REPAYMENTLoan Repayment and Cheque Review Statement Generator — A Finance module report that collects and aggregates loan repayment transactions from the SAP accounting ledger for a specified date range and renders the results as a printed Adobe Form — either a Loan Repayment Statement or a Cheque Review Statement. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed BTP Side-by-Side. SAP Forms Service for statements; released Customer Line Item APIs replace BSID. Side-by-side BTP extension with SAP Forms Service for statement rendering. Released Customer Line Item APIs replace direct BSID table access.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_MODIFY_TABLE_CONTENTLegacy Credit/Debit Ticket Company Code Mass Update — A Finance utility program that mass-updates the company code assignment on all legacy credit/debit ticket records in the SAP custom staging table to ensure correct organisational classification of historical financial transactions. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed On-Stack ABAP Cloud. Execute once, validate, retire. Minimal scope. Execute as a one-time data migration correction, validate, then retire. On-stack refactor for clean core compliance is sufficient given the minimal scope.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_OPEN_GL_UPLOADOpen GL Journal Entry Mass Upload from Excel — A finance upload tool that reads journal entry data from a local Excel file and mass-posts accounting documents (GL, AR, AP) into SAP FI via a standard posting BAPI. —Fully Available as part of the Standard BTP Side-by-Side. Migrate to S/4HANA Mass Upload or SAP Central Finance journal upload APIs. Migrate to standard SAP S/4HANA Mass Upload (SBWP/MDG) or SAP Central Finance journal upload APIs. BTP side-by-side for enhanced validation and user experience.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_OUTGOING_PAYMENTSOutgoing Vendor Payments Bulk Upload and Posting — A program that reads outgoing vendor payment data from an Excel file and posts them as Financial Accounting documents in SAP for company code SIDF. Standard Fiori App (F110)Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed Hybrid. On-stack ABAP Cloud refactor + released Payment APIs. Consider standard F110 as direct replacement. On-stack ABAP Cloud refactor using released Payment APIs. Consider standard S/4HANA Vendor Payment Run (F110) as direct replacement for bulk payment scenarios.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_PAYMENT_ORDER_SUM_FORMPayment Order Summary Form for Vendor Disbursement Authorisation — A finance program that collects procurement-to-payment data for a given payment batch and generates a structured Adobe Form Payment Order Summary used for formal vendor disbursement authorisation and record-keeping. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed BTP Side-by-Side. Released FI Payment + MM Purchasing APIs + SAP Forms Service by Adobe. Side-by-side BTP extension using released FI Payment and MM Purchasing APIs. SAP Forms Service by Adobe for PDF generation.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_PAYMENTS_FILE_TRANSFERZFI_PAYMENTS_FILE_TRANSFER — MT940 Bank Statement Automated Posting – Riyad Bank Payment Reconciliation
A program that retrieves daily MT940 bank statements from Riyad Bank via web service, parses payment transactions, and automatical...		 —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed BTP Side-by-Side. Integration Suite iFlow for MT940; S/4HANA Bank Statement Import for posting. Rebuild as Integration Suite iFlow for MT940 retrieval and parsing, with S/4HANA Bank Statement Import standard process for automated posting.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_PERCENTAGE_REPPercentage Report on Return Requests and Paid Invoices (SADAD Billing) — A Finance analytical report that retrieves SADAD electronic billing records and displays, per customer and bill, key performance indicators such as paid bill percentage, remaining balance, and Return Request percentage. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed BTP Side-by-Side. Fiori analytics using SADAD APIs. Consider SAP Analytics Cloud for KPIs. Side-by-side BTP Fiori analytics app using SADAD integration APIs. Consider SAP Analytics Cloud for KPI visualization.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_PROJECT_BUDGETProject Budget and Contract Monitoring Report — A financial oversight report consolidating project budgets, purchasing contracts, purchase orders, delivery progress, and invoiced amounts by fund center and commitment item. —Fully Available as part of the Standard BTP Side-by-Side. Evaluate standard S/4HANA Project Financial Monitoring Fiori apps first. Evaluate standard S/4HANA Project Financial Monitoring Fiori apps. Custom side-by-side BTP Fiori app if SIDF-specific fund center/commitment item structures require custom logic.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_PROJECT_BUDGET2Project Budget vs. Procurement Reconciliation Report — An interactive ALV report that reconciles approved project budgets against contracts and purchase orders, showing financial progress across expense categories for a given fiscal year. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed BTP Side-by-Side. Released FM + MM APIs. Rating C due to moderate custom table dependency. Side-by-side BTP Fiori app with released FM and MM APIs. Clean core rating C reflects moderate custom table dependency and standard API availability.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_R_DIS_PAY_UPD_ITMTXTDisbursement Payment Document Line-Item Text Update — A finance report that automatically composes and updates standardised item texts on loan disbursement payment accounting document lines, embedding document date, loan reference, and an Arabic description. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed Hybrid. On-stack ABAP Cloud using released FI Document Change APIs; Arabic text in released class. On-stack ABAP Cloud using released FI Document Change APIs. Arabic text composition logic encapsulated in released utility class.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_R_VDARL_GREG_HIJIRILoan Contract Gregorian to Hijri Date Conversion Report — A Finance report that retrieves loan contract draw-down dates from SAP Loans Management and displays them side-by-side in both Gregorian and Hijri calendar formats, with an option to download the results to a local Excel-compatible file. —Not Available as SaaS — Full BTP Extension as a Workaround BTP Side-by-Side. Released Loans Management APIs + BTP calendar conversion for Hijri/Gregorian. Side-by-side BTP Fiori extension using released Loans Management APIs and BTP calendar conversion services for Hijri/Gregorian translation.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_SADAD_BALANCE_REPORTSADAD Balance Reconciliation Report — A financial reconciliation report comparing customer installment and fee balances between the organisation's legacy loans management system and the SAP-integrated SADAD national bill-payment platform. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed BTP Side-by-Side. Fiori reconciliation app using SADAD Integration Suite + released FI/Loans APIs. Side-by-side BTP Fiori reconciliation app using SADAD Integration Suite APIs and released FI/Loans APIs.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_SADAD_INSTALLMENT_INVOICESADAD Installment Invoice Generation and Billing Review — A Finance report and form program that retrieves SADAD installment billing data for selected customers and either prints a formatted PDF invoice or displays an interactive billing summary on screen. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed Hybrid. On-stack refactor for SADAD data; BTP Side-by-Side for invoice PDF via SAP Forms Service. Hybrid: on-stack refactor for SADAD data retrieval using Integration Suite APIs; side-by-side for invoice PDF generation via SAP Forms Service.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_SADAD_LEGACY_ACCNT_UPDATELegacy Loan Customer Registration in SADAD Payment System — A migration program that enrolls pre-existing SAP loan customers into Saudi Arabia's SADAD electronic bill payment network by registering them as new billing parties with dual Gregorian and Hijri calendar date tracking. —Not Available as SaaS — Full BTP Extension as a Workaround BTP Side-by-Side. Integration Suite for SADAD API connectivity. Retire on-stack web service calls. Side-by-side BTP integration using SAP Integration Suite for SADAD API connectivity. Retire on-stack web service call patterns.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_SADAD_PAYMENTSTATUS_REPORTSADAD Payment Status Monitoring Report — A finance report displaying SADAD payment notification statuses, showing whether received payments have been successfully converted into SAP accounting documents. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed On-Stack ABAP Cloud. Released SADAD APIs. Evaluate standard SADAD integration monitor Fiori app. On-stack refactor using released SADAD integration APIs. Standard SADAD integration monitor Fiori app may be available as near-equivalent.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_SADAD_PROCESSSTATUSSADAD Electronic Payment Process Status Monitoring Report — A daily KPI monitoring report that consolidates success and rejection rates across all three SADAD electronic payment processes — Bill Upload, Payment Notification, and Bank Reconciliation. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed Hybrid. On-stack ABAP Cloud for KPI calc; BTP Fiori analytics dashboard for management. Hybrid: on-stack ABAP Cloud for KPI calculation; side-by-side BTP Fiori analytics dashboard for management visibility.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_SADAD_REPROCESSSADAD Payment Platform Reprocessing Report — A report to recover and retransmit failed customer account and bill upload transactions to Saudi Arabia's national SADAD electronic billing and payment platform. —Not Available as SaaS — Full BTP Extension as a Workaround Hybrid. On-stack retry logic + Integration Suite for SADAD API calls. Retire custom web service proxy. On-stack retry logic with side-by-side Integration Suite for SADAD API calls. Retire custom web service proxy; use standard Integration Suite error handling.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_SAMA_REPORTSAMA Regulatory Financial Statement Page 5 Report — A report that collects General Ledger account balances and generates Page 5 of the Saudi Arabian Monetary Authority (SAMA) regulatory financial statement as an Arabic-language Adobe Form with Gregorian and Hijri calendar dates. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed BTP Side-by-Side. SAP Forms Service for Arabic regulatory form; released GL balance CDS views. Side-by-side BTP solution with SAP Forms Service by Adobe for Arabic regulatory form. Released GL balance CDS views for data sourcing.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_SPELL_AMOUNTArabic Spell Amount Converter for Saudi Riyals — A finance utility that converts numeric monetary amounts into their full Arabic written-word representation in Saudi Arabian Riyals (SAR), suitable for use on cheques and official financial documents. —Not Available as SaaS — Full BTP Extension as a Workaround Hybrid. Convert to released ABAP Cloud utility class or BTP shared API service (used by many bank letters). Convert to released ABAP Cloud utility class or BTP service. Many bank letter programs depend on this; a shared BTP API service is the recommended approach.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_STATASTICAL_REPStatistical Report for Payment Methods — A Financial Accounting report that analyses posted payment transactions by payment method, showing each method's share of total transaction count and total payment amount across a user-selected posting date range. —Fully Available as part of the Standard On-Stack ABAP Cloud. Released FI payment document CDS views. Evaluate standard Payment Analytics Fiori app. On-stack ABAP Cloud refactor using released FI payment document CDS views. Consider standard S/4HANA Payment Analytics Fiori app as near-equivalent.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_TB_GM_REPORTTrial Balance GM Report with Arabic Form Output — A custom financial report that generates a formatted Trial Balance for a specified company code and reporting date, mapping general ledger account balances to a predefined account structure and rendering the output via an SAP Adobe Form with Arabic-Indic numeral support. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed BTP Side-by-Side + SAP Analytics Cloud for trial balance; SAP Forms Service for localized PDF. Side-by-side BTP with SAP Analytics Cloud for trial balance management reporting. SAP Forms Service by Adobe for localized PDF output.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_TB_GM_REPORT_2General Manager Trial Balance Report with Arabic Localisation — A formatted Trial Balance report for management that aggregates general ledger account balances by company and date, rendered via SAP Adobe Form with full Arabic numeral localisation. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed BTP Side-by-Side. Evaluate SAP Analytics Cloud for Arabic localisation support. Side-by-side BTP solution. Evaluate SAP Analytics Cloud for management trial balance with Arabic localisation support.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_TRIAL_BALANCEGeneral Ledger Trial Balance Report with Parked Documents — A financial accounting report that generates a General Ledger trial balance for a company code as of a selected date, showing both posted and parked document balances per G/L account, rendered as an Adobe Forms PDF. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed BTP Side-by-Side. I_TrialBalance CDS views; parked documents via released VBKPF/VBSEG APIs. Side-by-side BTP Fiori app using standard Trial Balance CDS views (I_TrialBalance). Parked document integration available via released VBKPF/VBSEG APIs.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_TRM_FD_REVENUEFixed Deposits Revenue Reporting Tool — A multi-view SAP Treasury report that calculates and presents fixed deposit interest revenue with interactive ALV grid output and bilingual English/Arabic Adobe Forms PDF generation. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed Hybrid. On-stack with released TRM Product CDS views; BTP Side-by-Side for bilingual PDF. On-stack refactor using released TRM Product CDS views; side-by-side for bilingual PDF via SAP Forms Service by Adobe.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_UNAMORT_DEF_INCOMEUnamortized Deferred Income Report for Loan Disbursements — A finance report that retrieves and displays unamortized deferred income entries for loan disbursements across a rolling five-year window, with quarterly and half-yearly subtotals, rendered as an Adobe PDF. —Not Available as SaaS — Full BTP Extension as a Workaround BTP Side-by-Side. SAP Forms for PDF; released Deferred Revenue CDS views replace custom table access. Side-by-side BTP Fiori analytics app with SAP Forms Service for PDF. Released Deferred Revenue CDS views replace direct custom table access.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_VENDOR_ITEM_DETAILSVendor Transfer Document Line Items Display (FBL1N Gateway) — A Financial Accounting report providing a pre-configured, restricted view of vendor line items filtered exclusively to Transfer document types for a fixed company code, acting as a controlled entry point into the standard SAP vendor line item display. —Fully Available as part of the Standard On-Stack ABAP Cloud. Retire — replace with standard FBL1N (Vendor Line Item Display) with variant. Retire and replace with standard FBL1N (Vendor Line Item Display) with variant. No custom development needed — standard SAP report fully covers the requirement.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_VENDOR_MASTERVendor Master Data Consolidation Report — A Finance (FI) report that displays comprehensive vendor master data including address, banking/IBAN details, VAT registration, payment terms, and compliance certificates for a specified company code and vendor selection. —Fully Available as part of the Standard On-Stack ABAP Cloud. Released Vendor/BP CDS views. Evaluate Manage Business Partners Fiori app. On-stack ABAP Cloud refactor using released Vendor/Business Partner CDS views and APIs. Standard Manage Business Partners Fiori app may cover core requirements.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_VENDOR_PAYMENT_REPORTVendor Payment Report with Bank Monitoring Status — An Accounts Payable report that consolidates vendor payment run results with vendor master details, clearing document information, and live bank transmission status into a single interactive ALV grid. —Fully Available as part of the Standard On-Stack ABAP Cloud. Released AP Payment + BCM status CDS views. Evaluate standard Payment Monitor. On-stack ABAP Cloud refactor using released AP Payment and BCM status CDS views. Evaluate standard Payment Monitor Fiori app coverage.
Finance (Custom) ZFI_VENDOR_PAYMENTSVendor Payment Entry and FI Document Posting — A program for finance staff to review pending vendor payment records in an editable grid and post them as official SAP FI accounting documents via BAPI. —Fully Available as part of the Standard Hybrid. On-stack RAP Fiori Elements for review; BTP Side-by-Side for payment authorization + bank comm. Hybrid: on-stack RAP-based Fiori Elements for interactive review screen, side-by-side BTP for payment authorization workflow and bank communication.
MM (Custom) ZMM_CONTRACT_REJECTContract Rejection — A Materials Management program designed to support the rejection of purchasing contracts within SAP MM. Exists only as a stub with no implemented logic. Standard Fiori App F2705AStandard Fiori App (F2705A)Fully Available as part of the Standard Retire — use standard Manage Purchase Contracts Fiori app (F2705A) with flexible workflow. Retire immediately. No custom development is needed. Use standard S/4HANA Public Cloud Manage Purchase Contracts Fiori app (F2705A) with flexible workflow for contract rejection.
MM (Custom) ZMM_CONTRACT_NOTIFICATIONContract Expiry Reminder Notification — A scheduled report that monitors SAP purchase contracts for upcoming and past expiry, categorises them by urgency, and sends branded HTML email notifications to stakeholders including PR approvers. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed BTP Side-by-Side. Replace EKKO/EKPO reads with I_PURCHASECONTRACTAPI01 CDS views. Side-by-Side BTP extension. Replace EKKO/EKPO direct reads with I_PURCHASECONTRACTAPI01 CDS views. Replace SO_NEW_DOCUMENT_ATT_SEND_API1 with CL_BCS_MAIL_MESSAGE or BTP Alert Notification Service.
MM (Custom) ZMM_CONTRACT_RPT_NEWPurchasing Contract Monitoring and Utilisation Report — A comprehensive ALV-based report consolidating contract header, line item, PO history, goods receipt, invoice, and FM budget-category breakdown data across 12 custom expense categories. —Fully Available as part of the Standard BTP Side-by-Side. Rebuild using I_PURCHASECONTRACTAPI01 + I_PURCHASECONTRACTHISTORYAPI01. Side-by-Side BTP rebuild consuming I_PURCHASECONTRACTAPI01, I_PURCHASECONTRACTITEMAPI01, I_PURCHASECONTRACTHISTORYAPI01, I_SUPPLIERINVOICEAPI01 CDS views. Expose ZMM_CONTRACT_ITM via RAP BO. Consider SAP Analytics Cloud for budget breakdown.
MM (Custom) ZMM_BG_REPORTBank Guarantee Expiry Monitoring and Email Notification Report — A background report that monitors purchase order bank guarantee expiry dates, categorises them by urgency, and sends email notifications with Excel attachments to configured recipients while displaying results in an ALV grid. —Not Available as SaaS — Full BTP Extension as a Workaround Hybrid. On-stack: I_BankGuarantee + CL_BCS_MAIL_MESSAGE. BTP Side-by-Side for Excel email via Integration Suite. Hybrid: on-stack refactor using I_BankGuarantee CDS view and C_BankGuaranteeValidity, replace SO_NEW_DOCUMENT_ATT_SEND_API1 with CL_BCS_MAIL_MESSAGE. Side-by-Side BTP for full Excel email dispatch via SAP Integration Suite.
MM (Custom) ZMM_BG_REPORT2Bank Guarantee Portfolio Display Report — A read-only interactive ALV report displaying active bank guarantees with full procurement context, linking guarantee headers to purchase orders, purchase requisitions, and vendor master data via hotspot navigation. —Not Available as SaaS — Full BTP Extension as a Workaround Hybrid. On-stack: I_BankGuarantee replacing AKKP/AKKB. Fiori Elements replaces REUSE_ALV_GRID. On-stack refactor using I_BankGuarantee CDS view replacing AKKP/AKKB. Replace REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY_LVC with Fiori Elements List Report. Clean core rating D due to unreleased AKKP/AKKB table access.
MM (Custom) ZMM_BG_VALIDITY_UPDATEBank Guarantee Validity Status Update — A background program that automatically identifies expired bank guarantees and updates their status to 'Expired' in the documentary payment system, running as a daily scheduled job. —Not Available as SaaS — Full BTP Extension as a Workaround On-Stack ABAP Cloud. Store custom status in Z-extension table; I_BankGuarantee for reads. On-stack refactor: store custom status in a Z-extension table rather than AKKP append. Use I_BankGuarantee CDS view for reads. Implement Application Job Framework scheduling. Add audit log via ZTBG_STATUS_LOG.
MM (Custom) ZMM_BG_VALIDITY_EMAILBank Guarantee Validity Email Notification — A background program that monitors bank guarantee expiry dates and sends categorised email notifications with Excel attachments to configured recipients. —Not Available as SaaS — Full BTP Extension as a Workaround Hybrid. On-stack or BTP Side-by-Side. Replace AKKP/AKKB with C_BankGuaranteeOverviewQry. Hybrid on-stack refactor or side-by-side BTP. Replace AKKP/AKKB with C_BankGuaranteeOverviewQry. Replace SO_NEW_DOCUMENT_ATT_SEND_API1 with CL_BCS_MAIL_MESSAGE. Replace Excel generation with BTP email attachment service.
MM (Custom) ZMM_BG_VALIDITY_EMAIL_2Bank Guarantee Validity Email Notification (Version 2) — An enhanced version of the BG validity email notifier with improved HTML email body construction, updated recipient handling, and legacy SpreadsheetML Excel code replaced with direct HTML email output. —Not Available as SaaS — Full BTP Extension as a Workaround Hybrid. Same migration path as ZMM_BG_VALIDITY_EMAIL. BTP preferred for Public Cloud compliance. Same migration path as ZMM_BG_VALIDITY_EMAIL. Side-by-side BTP preferred for full public cloud compliance. Replace CL_BCS/SO_NEW_DOCUMENT_ATT_SEND_API1 with CL_BCS_MAIL_MESSAGE or BTP Alert Notification Service.
MM (Custom) ZMM_RFX_BANK_GUARANTEE_FORMBank Guarantee Development Form for RFX Procurement — A program that generates formatted Adobe Form letters to banks for confirmation, revision, transfer, or return of bank guarantees associated with RFX procurement events, supporting bilingual English/Arabic output with Hijri calendar dates. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed Hybrid. Rating C. Replace DD_DOMVALUES_GET with custom CDS view or Z-table. Targeted on-stack refactoring (rating C). Replace unclassified DD_DOMVALUES_GET domain text FM with a custom CDS view or Z-table. Migrate Adobe Form rendering to SAP Forms Service by Adobe on BTP for public cloud compliance.
MM (Custom) ZMM_ROLES_UPDATE_RPTUser Roles Update Background Report — A background report that automates mass assignment or removal of SAP authorization roles for user groups within Materials Management, reading target user/role combinations from a configuration table and applying them via standard user management APIs. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed On-Stack ABAP Cloud. Use released IAM APIs. Consider SAP Cloud Identity Services for role assignment. On-stack ABAP Cloud refactor using released Identity and Access Management APIs. Consider SAP Identity Authentication Service (IAS) or SAP Cloud Identity Services for role assignment in S/4HANA Public Cloud.
MM (Custom) ZMM_PERFORMANCE_REPORTProcurement Performance Report (Purchase-to-Pay Cycle Tracking) — A procurement performance report that tracks the complete purchase-to-pay cycle from purchase requisition creation through purchase order approval, goods receipt, service entry, and invoice verification, including all workflow approval dates and approver names. —Fully Available as part of the Standard Hybrid. ABAP Cloud using I_PurchaseRequisitionAPI01 + I_PurchaseOrderAPI01 + I_SupplierInvoiceAPI01. Rebuild as ABAP Cloud side-by-side or on-stack RAP using released CDS views: I_PurchaseRequisitionAPI01, I_PurchaseOrderAPI01, I_MaterialDocumentItem, I_SupplierInvoiceAPI01. Fiori Elements List Report replaces classic ALV.
MM (Custom) ZMM_INVOICE_STATUS_REPORTMM Invoice Status Report with Workflow Recipient Identification — A read-only report displaying the processing status of vendor invoice documents — Posted, Deleted, or Pending — and identifying the workflow approvers currently responsible for pending invoices. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed Hybrid. I_SupplierInvoiceAPI01 for data + workflow OData APIs. Fiori Elements replaces classic ALV. Side-by-side BTP extension using I_SupplierInvoiceAPI01 for invoice data and workflow OData APIs for recipient identification. Fiori Elements List Report with workflow status tile replaces classic ALV.
MM (Custom) ZMM_GET_PO_APROVALPurchase Order Approval Level Display — A report that retrieves and displays the current approval level and release status of purchase orders, identifying which release group and release code has approved or is pending approval for each selected PO. —Fully Available as part of the Standard On-Stack ABAP Cloud. I_PurchaseOrderAPI01 + C_WorkflowTaskAnalytics; replace BAPI_PO_GETRELINFO. On-stack refactor using I_PurchaseOrderAPI01 CDS view for PO data and released workflow CDS views (C_WorkflowTaskAnalytics) for approval level tracking. Replace BAPI_PO_GETRELINFO with released OData equivalents.
MM (Custom) ZMM_MIRO_SCR_ENHNVendor Regulatory Compliance Gate for SAP Invoice Verification (MIRO/MIR7) — A custom screen enhancement embedded in SAP Invoice Verification that presents a live Saudi government regulatory compliance dashboard for the invoice vendor and enforces a mandatory user acknowledgement before an invoice can be parked. —Not Available as SaaS — Full BTP Extension as a Workaround BTP Side-by-Side. Full reimplementation as CAP + Fiori Elements side panel. SAPGUI module pool not in Public Cloud. Full side-by-side BTP reimplementation as CAP service + Fiori Elements side panel on standard Create Supplier Invoice app. The SAPGUI module pool screen enhancement pattern does not exist in S/4HANA Public Cloud.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_PR_CREATEP2P RFP to Purchase Requisition Creation — A custom SAP MM report that converts approved Request for Proposal (RFP) records stored in custom Z-tables into standard SAP Purchase Requisitions via BAPI_PR_CREATE, supporting both goods and service document types. —Fully Available as part of the Standard Hybrid. Replace BAPI_PR_CREATE with CE_PURCHASEREQUISITION_0001 OData V4 PATCH; Integration Suite for RFP workflow. Hybrid: on-stack refactor replacing BAPI_PR_CREATE with CE_PURCHASEREQUISITION_0001 OData V4 PATCH. Side-by-side BTP for enhanced RFP-to-PR integration workflow via SAP Integration Suite.
MM (Custom) ZMM_REQUISTIONER_TRACKINGPurchase Requisition Requisitioner Tracking and Coordinator Assignment — An interactive tool for purchasing supervisors to view open purchase requisitions, assign Purchasing Unit Heads and Coordinators to PR line items, save assignments back to SAP, and automatically notify assigned coordinators by email. Fiori App F2047AFiori App F2047A (Manage Purchase Requisitions with Responsibility)Fully Available as part of the Standard Retire — use standard F2047A (Manage Purchase Requisitions with Responsibility) + Responsibility Management. Retire and replace with standard S/4HANA Fiori App F2047A (Manage Purchase Requisitions with Responsibility). Configure Responsibility Management for dual-role assignment. No custom development needed.
MM (Custom) ZMM_REQUISTIONER_TRACKING_EDIPurchase Requisition Coordinator Assignment (EDI Enhanced Version) — An enhanced version of the PR coordinator assignment tool with additional filtering options, improved user interface for bulk assignment, and enhanced email notification with bilingual Arabic/English content. Standard S/4HANA Public CloudStandard S/4HANA Public Cloud functionalityFully Available as part of the Standard Retire — use standard F2047A. Minimal BTP extension if EDI dual-role gap confirmed. Retire: use standard F2047A Responsibility Management. If confirmed gap with EDI-specific dual-role propagation, implement minimal side-by-side BTP extension using CE_PURCHASEREQUISITION_0001 OData V4 API.
MM (Custom) ZMM_REQUISTIONER_TRACKING_BEDPurchase Requisition Coordinator Assignment (BED Version) — A further variant of the PR coordinator assignment program supporting BED (Basic Engineering Design) procurement category with enhanced filtering and coordinator assignment capabilities for engineering project requisitions. Standard S/4HANA Public CloudStandard S/4HANA Public Cloud functionalityFully Available as part of the Standard Retire — configure Responsibility Management for BED category. Standard fully covers requirement. Retire: configure Responsibility Management for BED category-specific coordinator assignments. S/4HANA standard fully covers the requirement via F2047A. Clean up all three tracker variants (base, EDI, BED) in a single retirement.
MM (Custom) ZMM_UPDATE_ONBHLF_PRPR 'On Behalf Of' Field Update Utility — A utility report that updates the custom ZZONBHLF 'On Behalf Of' field on purchase requisition line items, allowing supervisors to record that a PR was raised on behalf of another user. Standard S/4HANA Public CloudStandard S/4HANA Public Cloud functionalityFully Available as part of the Standard Retire — use S/4HANA standard 'On Behalf Of' functionality. Expose ZZONBHLF via Custom Fields if needed. Retire: use S/4HANA standard 'On Behalf Of' functionality (supported during PR creation via standard process). Expose ZZONBHLF as custom field via Custom Fields and Logic app if retroactive field update is required for historical records.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_RFP_STATUSRFP Header Details and Approval Status Report for Management — A read-only report providing a consolidated view of all active and historical RFP (Request for Proposal) records, including current workflow approval status, responsible party, SLA deadline, and breach indicator for procurement governance. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed On-Stack ABAP Cloud. RAP read-only BO with Fiori Elements List Report. Replace REUSE_ALV_GRID. On-stack ABAP Cloud refactor as RAP read-only BO with Fiori Elements List Report. Replace REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY with Fiori Elements. Replace F4IF_INT_TABLE_VALUE_REQUEST with CL_SHDB_SHLP. SLA utility class ZCL_ZMM_P2P_RFP_UTILS refactored to ABAP Cloud compliant class.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_RFP_TEC_MEM_UPDMunafasat RFP Technical and Qualification Committee Member Update — An interactive procurement report that allows authorized administrators to view and update Technical Committee Member and Qualification Committee Member assignments on Munafasat (competitive tender) RFP records, with real-time HR-based user validation. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed On-Stack RAP. Editable Fiori Elements List Report. Replace PA-table HR validation with I_BusinessPartner API. On-stack RAP refactoring: rebuild as editable Fiori Elements List Report using ABAP Cloud. Replace PA-table-based HR validation with I_BusinessPartner or Workforce Person OData API. Clean core rating C — moderate remediation required.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_RFP_BOQ_CUTOVERP2P RFP Bill of Quantities Cutover Data Enrichment — A one-time cutover utility that back-fills project identifiers and financial commitment item codes into existing Bill of Quantities records by cross-referencing RFP requisition data and project budget master records. —Not Available as SaaS — Full BTP Extension as a Workaround On-Stack ABAP Cloud. Execute once, validate, retire. Minimal refactoring needed. Execute once, validate data, retire. Minimal on-stack refactoring: replace CL_DEMO_OUTPUT with CL_SALV_TABLE, add explicit COMMIT/ROLLBACK, add application logging (CL_BALI_LOG). Run ATC check. Total effort: 3–5 days.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_RFP_APPRV_NOTIFRFP Workflow Approval Notification — A background program that monitors RFP workflow approval queues and sends bilingual HTML email notifications to approvers when RFP documents are awaiting their action, including SLA deadline information. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed Hybrid. On-stack: CL_BCS_MAIL_MESSAGE. BTP Alert Notification Service for Public Cloud compliance. Hybrid: on-stack refactor replacing BCS legacy classes with CL_BCS_MAIL_MESSAGE. Side-by-side BTP option using BTP Alert Notification Service for public cloud compliance. Replace PA-table HR lookups with released People OData APIs.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_RFP_FILES_CUTOVERP2P RFP Files Migration to FileNet — A one-time cutover utility that migrates RFP-associated document files from the SAP application server to a FileNet content management system, reading file metadata from custom Z-tables and calling the FileNet REST API for each document. —Not Available as SaaS — Full BTP Extension as a Workaround BTP Side-by-Side. Integration Suite for FileNet HTTP. Migrate Z-table file registry to BTP. Side-by-Side BTP: use SAP Integration Suite for FileNet HTTP connectivity. Migrate Z-table file registry to BTP-managed entity. Use standard SAP Document Management OData API (API_DMS_PROCESS_SRV) as alternative to FileNet if DMS migration is preferred.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_CMT_STATUS_REPORTProcure-to-Pay Committee Tender Approval Status Report — A procurement report that displays the real-time workflow approval status of tender requests, including the responsible committee, approver role, approver name, and SLA deadline, enabling monitoring of SLA breaches in the committee approval process. —Fully Available as part of the Standard On-Stack RAP. Read-only Fiori Elements List Report. Replace CL_SALV_TABLE with CDS annotations. On-Stack RAP refactoring as read-only Fiori Elements List Report. Replace CL_SALV_TABLE with CDS view annotations and RAP BO. Refactor ZCL_ZMM_P2P_CMT_UTLTY to ABAP Cloud compliant class. Achieves Level A compliance with targeted remediation.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_CMT_SLABREACH_NOTIFIERP2P Committee Tender SLA Breach Notifier — A background report that monitors active purchase-to-pay tenders, identifies overdue approvals that have exceeded their SLA thresholds, and automatically sends bilingual HTML email notifications to the responsible approver and committee head. —Not Available as SaaS — Full BTP Extension as a Workaround On-Stack ABAP Cloud. Replace CL_BCS/* with CL_BCS_MAIL_MESSAGE; assess WWW_HTML_MERGER. On-Stack refactoring: replace CL_BCS/CL_DOCUMENT_BCS/CL_SAPUSER_BCS/CL_CAM_ADDRESS_BCS with CL_BCS_MAIL_MESSAGE. Assess WWW_HTML_MERGER for ABAP Cloud compatibility. Entire data layer is customer Z-tables — minimal migration complexity.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_CMT_DISPLAY_LOGP2P Committee Audit Log Display (JSON Viewer) — A read-only report that retrieves a specific committee log entry from the custom audit log table by GUID and renders its full JSON payload in a human-readable format for audit, compliance, and traceability purposes. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed BTP Side-by-Side. Fiori Elements / RAP read-only app. Replace CL_DEMO_OUTPUT with Fiori JSON viewer. Side-by-Side BTP Fiori Elements or RAP read-only app. Replace CL_DEMO_OUTPUT with proper Fiori JSON viewer. Expose ZMM_P2P_CMT_LOG as released ABAP Cloud entity with OData V4 service. GUID-based lookup preserved as OData key.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_CMT_VNDR_DELP2P Vendor Commitment Record Deletion Utility — A data-cleansing program that removes a specific vendor's commitment entry from the custom Procure-to-Pay commitment register for a given tender, identified by a mandatory Tender ID and Vendor ID combination. —Not Available as SaaS — Full BTP Extension as a Workaround On-Stack ABAP Cloud. RAP BO with deleteVendorCommitment action + Fiori Elements confirmation dialog. On-stack refactor to RAP Business Object: model ZMM_P2P_CMT_VNDR as a RAP-managed entity, expose deleteVendorCommitment as a RAP action with Fiori Elements confirmation dialog. Remove naked COMMIT WORK (delegate to RAP framework). No SAP API replacements needed — only structural rewrite into ABAP Cloud model. Optionally consume CE_SOURCINGSUPPLIERLISTEVENTS business event to trigger deletion automatically on vendor withdrawal.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_CMT_WF_LOGCUTOVERP2P Committee Production Cutover Utility (Workflow Log & Vendor Data) — A multi-mode production cutover utility that corrects committee workflow log step assignments, updates table data, generates placeholder vendor bids for testing, and corrects RFP department codes in workflow logs — all controlled by a radio button selection screen. —Not Available as SaaS — Full BTP Extension as a Workaround On-Stack refactoring only. All 6 tables are customer-owned — no SAP standard table migration needed. On-stack refactoring only. All 6 tables are fully customer-owned — no SAP standard table migration needed. Fix identified bug (field-symbol assignment in item loop). Migrate to global ABAP Cloud class. Execute in production, validate, decommission.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_CMT_FILES_CUTOVERP2P Committee Files Migration to FileNet — A one-time cutover utility that migrates committee procurement document files from the SAP application server to a FileNet content management system, with per-file HTTP REST API calls, 2-second throttling, and bulk Z-table writeback of FileNet GUIDs. —Not Available as SaaS — Full BTP Extension as a Workaround BTP Side-by-Side. Integration Suite for FileNet; migrate to BTP Document Service or S/4HANA DMS API. Side-by-Side BTP: SAP Integration Suite for FileNet connectivity. Move file storage to BTP Document Service or S/4HANA DMS OData API (API_DMS_PROCESS_SRV). Design for idempotent re-runs to handle partial migration failures.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_COC_FILE_UPLOADCertificate of Conformance (COC) Document Mass Upload to SAP DMS — A batch upload program that reads an Excel file containing Certificate of Conformance document metadata and mass-creates linked DMS document records in SAP, attaching them to their corresponding accounting documents in the Procure-to-Pay process. —Not Available as SaaS — Full BTP Extension as a Workaround BTP Side-by-Side. Replace BAPI_DOCUMENT_CREATE2 with API_DMS_PROCESS_SRV. Build Fiori upload app. Side-by-Side BTP: replace BAPI_DOCUMENT_CREATE2 with API_DMS_PROCESS_SRV OData API. Build Fiori upload app replacing Excel OLE automation. Migrate ZDMS_DOWNLOAD to BTP-managed entity. Clean core rating C — moderate complexity.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_COC_SLABREACH_NOTIFIERP2P Certificate of Conformance SLA Breach Notifier — A background report that monitors outstanding Certificate of Conformance submissions in the P2P process, identifies those that have exceeded their SLA deadlines, and sends bilingual HTML email notifications to responsible parties. —Not Available as SaaS — Full BTP Extension as a Workaround On-Stack ABAP Cloud. Replace BCS email classes with CL_BCS_MAIL_MESSAGE; assess WWW_HTML_MERGER. On-stack refactoring: replace legacy BCS email classes with CL_BCS_MAIL_MESSAGE. Assess WWW_HTML_MERGER availability in ABAP Cloud. All data is custom Z-tables — data layer migration not required.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_CON_SLABREACH_NOTIFIERP2P Contract SLA Breach Notifier — A background report that monitors active purchase-to-pay contracts, identifies overdue approvals that have exceeded their SLA thresholds, and automatically sends bilingual HTML email notifications to the responsible approver and their line manager. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed Hybrid S+O. On-stack: replace 4 BCS classes + WWW_HTML_MERGER; BTP Alert Notification for Public Cloud. Hybrid S+O approach: on-stack refactoring for fastest compliance (replace 4 BCS classes with CL_BCS_MAIL_MESSAGE, replace WWW_HTML_MERGER). Side-by-Side BTP for long-term public cloud target using BTP Alert Notification Service.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_PGM_CONTRACTS_SYNCP2P Program Contracts Synchronisation — A background synchronisation program that reads newly released SAP purchasing contracts, looks up their associated P2P RFP records, and creates corresponding P2P contract records in custom Z-tables with initial workflow approval log entries. —Fully Available as part of the Standard Hybrid. Replace EKKO/EKPO/LFA1 reads with I_PurchaseContractAPI01; use CE_PURCHASECONTRACTEVENTS. Hybrid: on-stack refactor replacing EKKO/EKPO/LFA1/ADRC direct SELECTs with I_PurchaseContractAPI01 CDS view. CE_PURCHASECONTRACTEVENTS business event can trigger sync in real-time. Side-by-Side for BTP-based event processing.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_BUDGET_PERIOD_UPDP2P Budget Period Allocation Maintenance — An interactive report allowing authorized budget administrators to view, allocate, and distribute budget amounts across fiscal periods for cost centers in the P2P process, with editable ALV grid and FM budget integration. —Fully Available as part of the Standard Hybrid. On-stack RAP editable table using released FM APIs; BTP Side-by-Side for SAC analytics. Hybrid: on-stack RAP editable table for budget period entry using released FM APIs. Side-by-Side for enhanced analytics dashboard using SAP Analytics Cloud. Replace direct FM table access with I_FMCOMMITMENTITEM CDS views.
MM (Custom) ZMM_P2P_EVAL_FORM_TESTP2P Committee Procurement Evaluation Form — A function module-based form generator that assembles all committee evaluation data — vendor bids, member assignments, workflow dates, MOM narratives, HR organizational details — into a structured header for Adobe Form printing of the official tender evaluation document. —Not Available as SaaS — Full BTP Extension as a Workaround BTP Side-by-Side. CAP service aggregating Z-table data via OData APIs; Adobe Form to SAP Forms Service. Side-by-Side BTP: rebuild as CAP service aggregating Z-table data via released OData APIs. Migrate Adobe Form to SAP Forms Service by Adobe on BTP. HR org data via released I_BusinessPartner/Workforce Person APIs replacing PA0001/PA0002 direct reads.
MM (Custom) ZMM_R_VAT_REPORTPurchase Order VAT (Zakat) Report — A Financial/Materials Management cross-module report that retrieves purchase order tax (VAT/Zakat) amounts from pricing conditions and displays them alongside vendor, PO header, and account assignment data for VAT reconciliation and reporting. —Available — Standard & BTP Extension Needed Hybrid. I_PurchaseOrderAPI01 + I_PurchaseOrderItemAPI01; replace KONV with I_PurgDocPricingElement. Hybrid: on-stack refactor using I_PurchaseOrderAPI01 and I_PurchaseOrderItemAPI01 CDS views. KONV direct access is the primary Level D violation — replace with I_PurgDocPricingElement CDS view or CE_PURCHASEORDER_0001 OData V4 with pricing elements node.
MM (Custom) ZMM_BANK_GUARANTEE_FORMBank Guarantee Document Generation and Printing — A program that generates and prints formatted bank guarantee documents (Confirmation, Revision, Transfer, Return) as Adobe PDF Smart Forms for submission to the bank, triggered by a single financial document number with bilingual Arabic/English support. —Not Available as SaaS — Full BTP Extension as a Workaround Hybrid. Full BTP re-architecture. Replace AKKP/AKKB with I_BankGuarantee CDS view. Full side-by-side BTP re-architecture. Replace AKKP/AKKB with I_BankGuarantee CDS view. Replace Smart Forms (FP_JOB_OPEN/CLOSE) with SAP Forms Service by Adobe on BTP. Replace LFA1/address reads with I_Supplier. Replace HR lookups with Business Partner OData API. Use SAP Output Management for document dispatch. Estimated effort: L (30–50 days).
MM (Custom) ZMM_PO_ANALYTICSPurchase Order Analytics Report — A comprehensive MM report providing a consolidated real-time analytical view of purchase orders, covering procurement, delivery, invoicing, and payment status in a single interactive ALV grid with 16 output columns. Standard Fiori App (T024)Fully Available as part of the Standard BTP Side-by-Side. I_PurchaseOrderAPI01 + I_MaterialDocumentItem + I_SupplierInvoiceAPI01. Side-by-Side BTP using I_PurchaseOrderAPI01 (EKKO), I_PurchaseOrderItemAPI01 (EKPO), I_PurOrdAccountAssignmentAPI01 (EKKN), I_PurchaseOrderHistoryAPI01 (GR/IR), I_MaterialDocumentItem_2 (goods movements), I_SupplierInvoiceAPI01 (invoices), I_ClearedVendorItem (payments), I_Supplier (LFA1), I_PurchasingGroup (T024). Standard SAP Fiori PO analytics apps cover the base scenario — evaluate direct retirement before custom rebuild.
MM (Custom) ZMM_CONTRACT_RPTPurchasing Contracts Consolidated Report — A read-only ALV grid report that consolidates purchasing contract header details, vendor data, release status, financial values, released purchase orders, invoiced amounts, and delivery percentages into a single procurement overview screen with three selectable reporting modes. —Fully Available as part of the Standard On-Stack ABAP Cloud. I_PURCHASECONTRACTAPI01 + Fiori Elements. Evaluate retirement before investing. On-stack ABAP Cloud rebuild as Fiori Elements List Report using I_PURCHASECONTRACTAPI01, I_PURCHASECONTRACTITEMAPI01, I_PURCHASECONTRACTHISTORYAPI01, I_SUPPLIER CDS views. Standard Fiori apps (Manage Purchase Contracts F0842A, Central Purchasing Analytics) cover the base scenario — evaluate direct retirement before investing in a custom rebuild.
MM (Custom) ZMM_ROLES_UPDATE_RPT_BGAutomated SAP Authorization Role Assignment by Employee Organizational Subgroup — A background-capable report that automatically provisions SAP authorization roles to employees on both the local backend SAP system and a remote frontend (portal/SPG) system, driven by a custom HR role-mapping configuration table and the employee's current organizational subgroup classification. —Fully Available as part of the Standard BTP Side-by-Side. PA infotype tables don't exist in Public Cloud — HCM runs in SuccessFactors. Side-by-Side BTP extension required. PA infotype tables (PA0000, PA0001, PA0105) do not exist in S/4HANA Public Cloud — HCM runs in SuccessFactors. Replace with SuccessFactors OData APIs for employee data. Replace BAPI_USER_ACTGROUPS_ASSIGN with CE_BUSINESSUSER_0001 or MANAGEBUSINESSUSERIN IAM APIs. Replace RFC frontend call with SAP Integration Suite flow. Remove SUSR_SYNC_USER_TABLES (authorization buffer sync is automatic on cloud platform).
MM (Custom) ZMM_INVOICE_FROM_POAutomated Invoice Parking from Approved Purchase Orders — A program that identifies fully-approved custom purchase orders (type ZCPO) without invoices and automatically parks AP invoice documents in SAP after interactive user confirmation, reducing manual AP effort in the procure-to-pay cycle. —Fully Available as part of the Standard On-Stack ABAP Cloud. Replace EKKO/EKPO with I_PURCHASEORDERAPI01; replace RSEG duplicate check. On-stack ABAP Cloud rebuild: replace EKKO/EKPO reads with I_PURCHASEORDERAPI01/I_PURCHASEORDERITEMAPI01 CDS views. Replace RSEG duplicate check with I_SUPLRINVCITEMPURORDREFAPI01. Replace BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_PARK with EML against I_SUPPLIERINVOICETP RAP BO. Replace CL_SALV_TABLE popup and ALV with Fiori Elements List Report. Remove BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT (RAP manages LUW automatically). Externalise hardcoded SIDF company code to configuration. Estimated effort: M (16 days).
PP (Custom) Z_PP_MM_PGM — PO & Contract Print Program (Adobe PDF)Purchase Order and Contract Print Program (PDF Output via Adobe Forms) — A custom SAP output determination print program that collects purchasing document data, calculates pricing including VAT and discounts, and generates formatted PDF documents via Adobe Forms for standard POs, service POs, and procurement contracts. —Fully Available as part of the Standard Full BTP re-architecture: CAP + CE_PURCHASEORDER_0001 + CE_PURCHASEORDEREVENTS + SAP Forms Service. Full side-by-side re-architecture on SAP BTP: CAP service consuming CE_PURCHASEORDER_0001 OData V4 and released CDS views, triggered by CE_PURCHASEORDEREVENTS business event. SAP Forms Service by Adobe replaces FP_JOB_OPEN/CLOSE/FP_FUNCTION_MODULE_NAME. Replace HR lookup chain (USR21/ADRP/ADR2/ADR6/PA0105) with Business Partner OData API. Estimated effort: XL (52 days).
PP (Custom) Z_PP_MM_RFQ — PO Print with Bilingual PDF & Approval VerificationPurchase Order Print Program with Bilingual PDF Output and Approval Verification — A SAP output-message-driven program that collects all purchase order data, verifies approval status, converts amounts to words, and renders a formatted bilingual Arabic/English PDF document via SAP Adobe Forms. —Fully Available as part of the Standard Hybrid S+O. Standard S/4HANA Output Management + BTP CAP for bilingual PDF + SAP Forms by Adobe. Hybrid S+O approach: Standard S/4HANA Output Management for approval governance and output channel framework; BTP Side-by-Side CAP service for bilingual form orchestration, Arabic/English PDF rendering via SAP Forms by Adobe. Cannot be purely retired (bilingual layout and amount-in-words not standard) nor purely on-stack (Adobe Forms FP_* not available in ABAP Cloud). Estimated effort: XL.
